mapper.select: select id, user_id, order_no, amount, status, created_at from sys_order where status = #{status} order by id desc

select o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.amount as amount, o.status as orderStatus, u.id as userId, u.username as username, u.email as email from sys_order o left join sys_user u on o.user_id = u.id and u.deleted = 0 where o.status = #{status} order by o.id desc
